description_long: This filing cabinet features a rectangular, boxy form with a two-tone exterior. The front and side panels are clad in a light wood veneer with a horizontal plank pattern, while the top and rear surfaces are finished in a smooth, matte gray material. The cabinet appears solid and robust, with no visible handles, drawers, or hardware on any side, suggesting a minimalist or modern design. The absence of visible seams or joints on the gray surfaces gives it a monolithic appearance. Its size and proportions are consistent with a low, wide filing cabinet or storage pedestal, suitable for placement against a wall or under a desk. The overall aesthetic is clean and contemporary, blending natural wood textures with industrial gray surfaces.
description: A modern, rectangular filing cabinet with light wood sides and a matte gray top and back, featuring a seamless, minimalist design.
description_view_0: The front view shows a light wood panel with a horizontal plank pattern, occupying the entire visible face.
description_view_1: The left side view highlights the matte gray top surface and a thin strip of wood along the left edge.
description_view_2: The rear view displays a solid matte gray panel with no visible features or hardware.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing the matte gray top and a narrow wood strip on the right edge.
